metadata.title:
MISS FERGUSON UNABLE TO
APPEAR FOR SECOND TRIAL
BECAUSE OF hARASSlNG
TACTICS OF COMPANY.

pages.raw_text:
Worried by repeated medical in
spections and X-ray examinations
demanded by the defendant. Myrtle
Ferguson, the frail girl who re-
Gently appeared in court on cot
at the first trial of her case, was
today compelled by physical weak
ness, to dismiss for the present her
snit for $20.600 damages against
the Washington Water Power Co.
The defendant corporation has
fled motion after motion for ex
aminations of the girls person.
the last one being today. when the
defendant asked that the girl sub
NIT to an examination under an
anaesthetic to see whether or not
her claim that she was too Ill TO at
tend another trial of the case at
this time was correct.


At the same time the defendant
